patterns_recognized: HARD CAP 1 dominates today's scored slate: fires on CLE@DET (-9.3pp), TOR@NYY (-7.1pp), and MIL@CHC (-1.2pp), demoting all three from A-/PLATINUM/DIAMOND pre-cap to B-. Validated 5+ times in archive — negative-edge market information consistently superior regardless of F-signal strength.

Elite SP anchor OVERRIDE pattern repeats: McClanahan (TB, 30-15 team) and Bryan Woo (SEA) confirmed via live API as quality home starters in games where the model picks the away team with large f5_full_delta and fair_prob near/below 0.42 — direct analogy to SEA@HOU OVERRIDE wins on 05-11 and 05-12.

Extreme model_prob artifacts (outside [0.48, 0.72]) on LAD@SD (0.7614) and SF@ARI (0.7475) trigger automatic SKIP — consistent with SF@LAD and ATL@LAD calibration artifact pattern from 05-10 through 05-14.

Coors Field suppresses f5_full_delta OVERRIDE logic: TEX@COL has MacKenzie Gore (quality) pitching for TEX but model picks COL at 62.7% full game — confirmed Coors late-game bullpen inflation artifact; archive (05-15 ARI@COL) confirmed OVERRIDE to COL is wrong direction at this park.

CLE @ DET.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 correctly demoted from pre-cap B- to B- on edge=-9.26pp, zeroing stake. Framber Valdez (DET home SP, confirmed via API) is quality; SP edge 0.94 xERA agrees with DET pick. But fair_prob=0.5933 means market prices DET at 59.3% vs model's 50.07% — market is substantially more bullish on DET. f5_full_delta=0.2182 (CLE/Cecconi dominates F5 at 71.9%) makes the full-game DET thesis tenuous. HARD CAP 1 is absolute. No stake.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1 negative-edge prevention (5+ archive validations)
Market information superiority when edge is negative

BAL @ TB.reasoning: Shane McClanahan confirmed as TB's SP (live API) — a legitimate ace. f5_full_delta=0.2786 means TB dominates F5 at 77.75% via McClanahan. The BAL full-game pick requires TB's bullpen to implode after McClanahan's dominance — an implausible thesis. TB is 30-15 (.667) vs BAL 21-26 (.447). All signals against BAL: SP -2, PQI -1, Stage 1/2 disagree -1, confidence_downgrade, acute_roster. OVERRIDE to TB directionally; no stake (SKIP tier maintained).
lessons_applied: Elite SP confirms Stage 1/2 gap OVERRIDE (SEA@HOU 05-11/05-12 analogy)
f5_full_delta > 0.20 + confirmed elite opposing SP + stacked flags = OVERRIDE
TB record quality gap reinforces direction

CIN @ PHI.reasoning: Clean B-grade pick with perfect Stage 1/2 agreement (delta=0.004) and PQI confirming PHI (+4.6). Andrew Painter (PHI home SP) vs Nick Lodolo (CIN). Edge missed the [4,15]pp band floor by 0.03pp (+3.97pp) — otherwise GOLD-eligible. PHI lineup (Turner, Harper, Bohm, Stott, Realmuto) is strong at Citizens Bank Park. No stress flags. Directionally sound SKIP with clean grade.
lessons_applied: Edge band floor prevents stake on clean picks — 3.97pp misses by 0.03pp

ATL @ MIA.reasoning: Model picks MIA home (53.85%) despite ATL's 32-15 record visiting 21-26 MIA. Max Meyer (MIA SP) vs JR Ritchie (ATL SP, thin Statcast sample flagged in prior run). SP matchup may favor Meyer. Confidence_downgrade=True signals uncertainty. Edge below band (+2.39pp). ATL's elite lineup (Olson, Riley, Albies) noted but without verified SP xERA confirming Ritchie's quality, OVERRIDE is not justified. CONFIRM SKIP.
lessons_applied: confidence_downgrade reduces conviction below OVERRIDE threshold
No OVERRIDE without verified SP quality or injury data

NYM @ WSH.reasoning: Tier=GOLD but grade collapsed to C (score=0): SP edge 1.82 xERA AGAINST WSH (Christian Scott >> Jake Irvin) and PQI=-26.6 strongly against WSH. PQI at -26.6 signals heavy late-game degradation — F3=2908.6 swing-take advantage doesn't survive the full game. F3-only GOLD with opposing PQI and SP edge has failed consistently in archive (CHC@ATL 05-14). Explicitly DOWNGRADE GOLD to SKIP to prevent misclassification. No stake either way.
lessons_applied: PQI strongly against invalidates F3-only GOLD signal
SP edge against the pick undermines tier elevation

TOR @ NYY.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 fires on edge=-7.08pp, demoting pre-cap A- (score=4) to B-. Pre-cap signals were elite: F2=0.037, F3=7165.3 (largest on slate), SP edge 1.88 xERA agrees, PQI +11.9. Patrick Corbin (TOR, declining veteran) vs Ryan Weathers (NYY). Fair_prob=0.6292 — market prices NYY at 62.9%, more bullish than model's 55.83%. Paying above market is negative-EV. HARD CAP 1 is absolute. NYY direction sound at 0.56 confidence but no stake.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1 absolute even at pre-cap A- tier
Market information superiority on negative-edge picks (5+ validations)

BOS @ KC.reasoning: Tier=GOLD but edge +3.37pp misses 4pp band floor, zeroing stake. Compounding negatives: bullpen_fatigue (stress_warnings), confidence_downgrade=True, PQI AGAINST KC (Δ=-4.7). Sonny Gray (BOS, quality veteran confirmed via API) is a strong arm the market likely priced correctly. F3=2368.3 fires for KC but without edge clearance and stacked flags, GOLD tier is unwarranted. Explicitly DOWNGRADE GOLD to SKIP.
lessons_applied: Edge band floor + stacked flags mandates SKIP
bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade stacking = DOWNGRADE (DET@KC 05-09 validated)

HOU @ MIN.reasoning: Grade C (score=0) SKIP. HOU 19-29 (.396) visiting MIN 21-26 (.447). HOU SP Tatsuya Imai (NPB import, thin Statcast sample) vs MIN SP Kendry Rojas (also limited). PQI AGAINST HOU at +21.9 is a significant late-game degradation signal. Stage 1/2 agree (Δ=0.03) — no bullpen carry complication. Extreme PQI against weakens directional conviction materially. CONFIRM SKIP.
lessons_applied: PQI strongly against reduces directional confidence on C-grade picks

MIL @ CHC.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 fires on edge=-1.16pp, demoting from A- (pre-cap=4) to B-. Pre-cap signals are slate's strongest: triple F-signal (F1=3.02, F2=0.022, F3=4658.4), SP edge 1.92 agrees (Shota Imanaga, confirmed elite lefty via API, vs Brandon Sproat), PQI +20.9 confirms, Stage 1/2 agree. Fair_prob=0.6156 — market even MORE bullish on CHC (61.56% vs 60.4%), hence negative edge. CHC direction is strongest pre-cap but HARD CAP 1 is absolute — even triple F-signal fire cannot override negative-EV staking (KC@CHW 05-14: F1=2.97 + F3=2313.3 still lost).
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1 absolute regardless of signal strength
Imanaga elite anchors directional confidence at 0.62 despite cap

TEX @ COL.reasoning: Coors Field park artifact. MacKenzie Gore (TEX, quality SP confirmed via API) dominates but SP edge runs 0.65 xERA AGAINST COL pick. Model gives COL 62.7% full game via Coors altitude late-game scoring inflation, not genuine team edge. Fair_prob=0.407 below 0.42 floor — market sees near-even. Bullpen_fatigue + calibration_caution_18_25pp active. Archive (05-15 ARI@COL 9-1 away blowout): Coors f5_full_delta artifacts do not support OVERRIDE to home team.
lessons_applied: Coors park f5_full_delta artifact — suppress Stage 1/2 signals (05-15 confirmed)
fair_prob below floor with D grade = SKIP confirmed

OAK @ LAA.reasoning: Grade D (-2) SKIP with negative edge (-1.49pp) and all signals against OAK: SP edge 0.89 xERA AGAINST (Walbert Ureña vs JT Ginn, both limited Statcast), PQI AGAINST (+12.0), confidence_downgrade=True. OAK 23-23 visiting LAA 16-31. Fair_prob=0.5442 — market slightly more bullish on OAK than model, yet SP and PQI both run against OAK. Lean LAA directionally but insufficient data for OVERRIDE. CONFIRM SKIP.
lessons_applied: Negative edge + SP against + PQI against = reliable D-grade SKIP

LAD @ SD.reasoning: Model_prob=0.7614 outside [0.48,0.72] range — automatic calibration artifact SKIP. Yoshinobu Yamamoto (LAD, confirmed via API) vs Michael King (SD) at Petco Park. Edge=+18.4pp in calibration_caution_18_25pp band and above 15pp ceiling. SP edge 0.34 xERA AGAINST LAD suggests King's 2026 Statcast form marginally exceeds Yamamoto's in model's current-season calculation. Acute_roster flag. LAD 76.14% probability is a lineup-quality overestimate. CONFIRM auto-cap.
lessons_applied: model_prob outside [0.48, 0.72] = calibration artifact (SF@LAD pattern 05-11 through 05-14)
calibration_caution_18_25pp enforced on suspicious-zone edge

SF @ ARI.reasoning: Model_prob=0.7475 outside [0.48,0.72] — calibration artifact. f5_full_delta=0.2336: ARI barely wins F5 at 51.38% but model gives ARI 74.75% full game — an implausible 23pp jump unexplainable by any realistic bullpen scenario. Zac Gallen (ARI, confirmed via API) vs Robbie Ray (SF); SP edge runs AGAINST ARI. Grade D (-3). Edge=+17.83pp in calibration zone. No reliable directional read at this model_prob extreme.
lessons_applied: model_prob outside range + large Stage 1/2 gap = calibration artifact (HARD CAP 3 context)
SF@ARI: 51% F5 to 75% full game is implausible

CHW @ SEA.reasoning: Bryan Woo confirmed as SEA's SP (live API) — the same pitcher who won 10-2 vs HOU on 05-12 in the archive OVERRIDE win. f5_full_delta=0.2521 (SEA dominates F5 at 71.78% via Woo). Fair_prob=0.3857 well below 0.42 floor (market prices CHW at only 38.6%). PQI AGAINST CHW at +30.1 — the largest PQI signal on the slate. Noah Schultz (CHW) vs Bryan Woo (SEA). All four OVERRIDE conditions converge: confirmed quality opposing SP + large f5_full_delta + fair_prob below floor + D grade with zero CHW signal support. OVERRIDE to SEA directionally; no stake (SKIP maintained).
lessons_applied: Bryan Woo elite SP confirmed (05-12 SEA@HOU OVERRIDE analogy: won 10-2)
fair_prob well below 0.42 floor signals market knowledge superiority
PQI +30.1 extreme against pick — largest late-game degradation signal on slate
f5_full_delta > 0.20 + confirmed elite SP + fair_prob below floor = OVERRIDE (6+ archive validations)
